nodes_added.label: Mendel F2 round:wrinkled ratio 2.96:1
nodes_added.content_excerpt: From 7324 F2 seeds, 5474 round and 1850 wrinkled were counted (ratio 2.96:1).

edges_added.reason_excerpt: Observed F2 ratio matches the 3:1 prediction of single-locus discrete factor inheritance.

notes: Direct support edge; F2 count is the canonical observation.

scope_tuple.quantity_effect: regression of child stature on midparent stature

nodes_added.label: Galton midparent regression slope ~0.65 in human stature
nodes_added.content_excerpt: Linear regression of child stature on midparent stature yields slope ~0.65 across 928 pairs.

edges_added.reason_excerpt: Continuous regression at the population level appears to contradict pure 3:1 discrete-factor inheritance.

notes: Contradiction edge added; reconciliation deferred to inquiry obligation.
